User.title: User Profile
User.description: Stores user information and their role (admin or standard user).

role.description: The user's role: 'admin' for unlimited usage, 'user' for limited usage.

createdAt.description: When the user profile was created.

DailyUsage.title: Daily Usage Log
DailyUsage.description: Tracks the number of renders a user has performed on a specific day.

count.description: The number of renders performed on this date.

lastUpdated.description: When the count was last incremented.

RenderHistory.title: Render History
RenderHistory.description: Stores the history of renderings generated by users.

userId.description: The UID of the user who generated the render.

imageUrl.description: The base64 data or URL of the generated image.

isVerified.description: Whether this render is marked as a standard example by an admin.

label.description: Optional label for few-shot training (e.g., 'Standard T4 Storefront').
